title: Observability Dashboard (per-stage pipeline latency UI)
description: Read-only per-stage AI pipeline latency dashboard UI: a GET feed (/api/admin/ai/pipeline) plus a "Pipeline latency (per-stage)" section inside the existing AI Command Center Observability tab. UI ONLY over the existing pipeline-read backend (OBS-001/OBS-002) — no new aggregation, no AI calls, mutates nothing.

verification.summary: PR #9 re-verified at head 9520982 + on final main: tsc 0 (after clearing a stale .next cross-branch artifact); eslint clean; test:ai 121/121 (incl. observability); ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ (/api/admin/ai/pipeline dynamic); Vercel + regression + Preview green; post-merge deploy READY. Live successful-provider validation still DEFERRED (Preview AI Gateway entitlement unresolved).

knownDifferences: Built Supercharged-native against SC's existing Observability tab + Section/Stat/scrollX kit rather than porting operion's AICommandShell — reuses the SC backend, adds no duplicate API.

rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 b6ad8fe (PR #9 merge). Read-only dashboard; AI_PIPELINE_OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED off ⇒ renders an "off" state, zero runtime exposure.
No migration, no env, no flag change.
compatibilityNotes: UI over existing pipeline-read; no new backend. Flag AI_PIPELINE_OBSERVABILITY_ENABLED OFF by default.

history.note: Observability dashboard UI identified as the deferred OBS surface downstream.
